summary: Tested P0-P1 priorities: Admin sessionStorage authentication, WhatsApp Cloud API integration, and Admin User Journey page. Found and fixed critical bug where session tokens weren't being accepted by admin routes. All features now working correctly.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Admin routes verify_admin() function didn't accept session tokens generated by login endpoint
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added set_admin_sessions() function and updated verify_admin() to check session tokens from admin_sessions dict

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: verify_admin_token() crashed with AttributeError when Cookie object was passed instead of string
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added type checking to handle Cookie objects properly

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: admin_sessions dict wasn't shared with admin routes
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added admin_routes.set_admin_sessions(admin_sessions) call after admin_sessions is defined

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: handleLogout() was using localStorage.removeItem instead of sessionStorage.removeItem

features_tested: Login with password 'celestaglow2024' returns session token
Session token stored in sessionStorage (not localStorage)
Stats cards visible (Orders, Revenue, Leads, Blogs)
Page loads without errors (hook dependencies fixed)
Stats displayed (Total Messages, Sent, Failed, Success Rate)
Token is SHA256 hash (64 hex characters)
Token stored in sessionStorage (cleared on browser close)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel now uses sessionStorage for tokens (security improvement). Session tokens are generated by server.py and shared with admin routes via set_admin_sessions(). WhatsApp Cloud API is integrated with credentials in backend/.env. All admin pages (Dashboard, User Journey, WhatsApp) load correctly with session token authentication.

sessionStorage_migration.login: Token stored in sessionStorage after login
sessionStorage_migration.dashboard: Token read from sessionStorage for API calls
sessionStorage_migration.logout: Token removed from sessionStorage on logout
sessionStorage_migration.security: Token not stored in localStorage (XSS protection)

admin_routes_token_verification.session_tokens: Admin routes now accept session tokens from login
admin_routes_token_verification.plain_password: Backward compatibility with plain password maintained

whatsapp_integration.admin_page: WhatsApp admin page shows stats and allows sending messages
